---
id: get
title: "Get the Web Data URI for a Web Page URL."
description: "The service will return a Web Data URI only for existing datasets. The Web Data URI is not guaranteed to exist (i.e. it may return 404)."
sidebar_label: "Get the Web Data URI for a Web Page URL."
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: api/manager/manager
custom_edit_url: null
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get the Web Data URI for a Web Page URL."}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/data-uri"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



The service will return a Web Data URI only for existing datasets. The Web Data URI is not guaranteed to exist (i.e. it may return 404).

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
